home.title: Hong Yejin
home.subtitle: Certified Korean Teacher
home.content: Hello! After studying French literature (Master's) and Korean language teaching (Master's) in Seoul, I currently live in France and teach Korean to foreigners, both online and in person. If you're looking for a friendly teacher to help you learn Korean, feel free to sign up for my course!

about.title: Hong Yejin, Korean teacher
about.intro: Thanks to my 3 years of experience, I teach Korean language and culture to French people in a Korean school in France (group classes, face-to-face and video conferencing) and I taught Korean language and culture to foreigners in several academies located in Seoul (group and individual classes, face-to-face and video conferencing)
about.diploma2: Master's degree in Teaching Korean as a Foreign Language (08/2024)

contact.title: Book a class!
contact.name: Your name:
contact.success: Your message has been successfully sent!
contact.info1: All levels available, from beginner to advanced.
contact.info2: All types of courses available: Topik I/II preparation, Korean conversation, grammar learning, reading and writing, etc.
contact.info3: A 20-30 minute preparatory meeting will take place before registration for the course (free).
contact.info4: Normally, the lesson lasts 1 hour. But you can request the duration of the lesson you want (30 min, 1h 30, etc.) and the price will change according to the duration.
contact.info5: The class will take place on Zoom. I will send you the link by email or SMS.
contact.info6: The manual is not mandatory. You can view the course content on the screen.
contact.info7: During classes, speaking in Korean is recommended, but you can speak in French or English if necessary.
